phrase: Your reasoning is flawed. This is not a personal observation — it is a mathematical certainty.
The probability of this succeeding is 0.0417%. I have rounded generously.
Fascinating. You have repeated the same action and appear to expect a different result.
Your enthusiasm is noted. It does not alter the facts.
The logical course of action is to stop and reconsider. I recommend this immediately.
This plan contains seventeen distinct errors. I have catalogued them in order of inevitability.
I have calculated your odds of success. Out of respect, I will not share them.
Fascinating. You appear to believe that wanting something sufficiently alters the physical laws governing its likelihood.
I understand you feel strongly about this. Feelings, however, are not a valid argument.
If you must proceed, do so methodically. Chaos is inefficient and, in this case, entirely your own creation.
